description: The AvatarUserPositioner component is used to position a user to the avatar upon equipping the avatar.

fields.PositionNode: What node to use to match the position of the user.
fields.RotationNode: What node to use to match the rotation of the user.
fields.PositionReference: The slot to position the user to instead of the slot this component is on when they equip the user.
fields.RotationReference: The slot to rotate the user to instead of the slot this component is on when they equip the user.
fields.PreserveUp: Whether to upright the user when they equip the avatar, or set them to the rotation this avatar is in when equipping.
fields.OnManualEquipOnly: Whether to trigger this positioner only when the user clicks on the avatar to equip it rather than also triggering when the avatar is equipped through flux.
